text: I know tomorrow feels heavy, and it's okay to be scared. You don't have to be brave or calm or anything other than exactly what you are right now. The fear doesn't mean anything is wrong; it just means you're human, facing something that matters. You're in capable hands, and the hardest part, the waiting and the wondering, is almost behind you. Rest as much as you can tonight, and remember you're not carrying any of this alone. I'm right here with you, before and after, and I'm not going anywhere. You've gotten through every hard day so far, and you'll get through this one too. I'll be thinking of you every minute.
